title: Frost Headphone — Indigo
summary: Frost headphone in indigo; built in Vietnam for daily use.

content.text:
# Frost Headphone — Indigo

Built for daily wear and refinishing. The Frost Headphone — Indigo is designed for the long haul, with audio-grade materials and a quiet, considered fit and finish.

## Highlights

- Crafted in Vietnam.
- Repairable construction with serviceable parts.
- Backed by a one-year materials warranty.

## Care

Condition every 60 days for best results. Spot-clean only; avoid harsh detergents. Store in a cool, dry place out of direct sunlight.
{"weight_g":224,"materials":{"upper":"waxed canvas","sole":"crepe rubber","lining":"cotton twill"},"care":"wipe with a damp cloth","made_in":"Vietnam","driver_mm":40}
